NETDATA_PORT.description: Port Netdata listens on for the web dashboard and API.

PGID.description: Process group ID for the Netdata process.

DOCKER_GROUP_ID.description: Docker group ID for container monitoring. Must match the host's docker group ID to access the Docker socket.

NETDATA_CLAIM_TOKEN.description: Claim token to connect this node to Netdata Cloud for multi-node observability.

NETDATA_CLAIM_URL.description: Netdata Cloud claim URL. Defaults to https://app.netdata.cloud.
